use std::collections::HashMap;

struct AppState {
    cache: HashMap<String, CachedEntry>,
    config: Config,
    metrics: Metrics,
}

struct CachedEntry {
    data: Vec<u8>,
    timestamp: u64,
}

struct Config {
    timeout: u64,
    max_retries: u32,
}

struct Metrics {
    hits: u64,
    misses: u64,
}

fn process_batch(state: &AppState, keys: &[String]) -> Vec<Vec<u8>> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for key in keys {
        let cloned = state.clone();
        if let Some(entry) = cloned.cache.get(key) {
            results.push(entry.data.clone());
        }
    }
    results
}

impl Clone for AppState {
    fn clone(&self) -> Self {
        Self {
            cache: self.cache.clone(),
            config: Config {
                timeout: self.config.timeout,
                max_retries: self.config.max_retries,
            },
            metrics: Metrics {
                hits: self.metrics.hits,
                misses: self.metrics.misses,
            },
        }
    }
}
